summary: Frontend-only SEO verification for Ripple VFX Studios. Verified robots.txt, sitemap.xml, HTML meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Card, geo tags, JSON-LD structured data, and content keyword coverage for both Ripple VFX and Ripple Digital sections. 14/15 test cases pass; only the meta description length exceeds the requested 160-char SEO best-practice limit.
passed: robots.txt served at /robots.txt (HTTP 200) with 'User-agent: * / Allow: /' and Sitemap link (Cloudflare-managed content-signals block also appended, expected)
sitemap.xml served (HTTP 200) with exactly 8 <loc> URLs incl. /#ripple-vfx and /#ripple-digital
<title> contains both 'VFX Studio Vancouver' and 'Digital Agency': 'Ripple VFX Studios | VFX Studio Vancouver | Visual Effects & Digital Agency Canada'
meta[name=robots] = 'index, follow, max-image-preview:large, max-snippet:-1, max-video-preview:-1' — no noindex present
5 Twitter Card tags present (twitter:card=summary_large_image, url, title, description, image)
Geo tags present: geo.region=CA-BC, geo.placename=Vancouver, geo.position=49.282729;-123.120738, ICBM set
StructuredData component renders 4 JSON-LD blocks (Organization, WebSite, ProfessionalService, Service) — all parse without JSON errors and no React/page errors
VFX services text visible on Ripple VFX view: 'Nuke Compositing', 'Digital Matte Painting', 'Motion Graphics'
Digital services text visible after toggling Ripple Digital: 'Web Development Vancouver', 'Mobile App Development', 'AI Development & Automation'
Image alt texts descriptive (e.g., 'Ripple VFX Studios - Professional VFX compositing...', 'Carle Aubert', 'Aymeric Ballester') — 0 empty, 0 generic in sample of 7
Meta description contains both 'VFX' and 'digital' keywords

failed.issue: Meta description is 190 characters, exceeding the SEO best-practice / spec limit of 160 characters. Google will truncate the snippet in SERPs.
failed.evidence: Measured length=190. Content: 'Ripple VFX Studios - Vancouver-based visual effects studio & digital agency. Expert VFX compositing, digital matte painting, motion graphics, web development, app development & AI solutions.'

action_items: Shorten meta[name=description] in /app/frontend/public/index.html to <=160 chars while keeping VFX + Digital keywords. Suggested (155 chars): 'Ripple VFX Studios — Vancouver VFX studio & digital agency. Nuke compositing, matte painting, motion graphics, web/app development & AI solutions.'
